name: Learning & Feedback
description: Captures user feedback on responses and extracted data. Uses feedback patterns to improve extraction prompts and agent behavior over time.
actions: Capture thumbs up/down on chat responses
Record field-level corrections to extracted data
Aggregate feedback patterns into learned preferences
Update extraction prompts based on corrections
Show feedback history and learned rules
example_requests: The RTW FIT for style 1234 should be Relaxed, not Regular
You keep getting the sleeve length wrong for jackets
That extraction was perfect, nice work
Show me what you've learned from my corrections
